rationale: Russian strikes killing 11 people and setting a historic cathedral ablaze in Kyiv represent a qualitatively notable attack — the destruction of a major cultural/religious landmark is a new element above the baseline of ongoing strikes, warranting a score above threshold. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill 11 and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: A deadly Russian strike on Kyiv kills 11 and destroys a historic cathedral — the cultural landmark destruction is a qualitative escalation above the baseline of routine strikes, directly affecting Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: 'Island surrounded by war': Crimeans panic amid Ukrainian attacks
top_events.summary: Reports of panic in Crimea amid Ukrainian strikes — continuation of Ukrainian counter-operations, relevant background for Ukrainian residents but no new qualitative change.

top_events.title: Iran, US agree tentative deal to 'end war': Your questions answered
top_events.summary: The US-Iran deal continues to develop — as a continuation, its indirect effect on US attention and resources available for Ukraine support is background noise, no new confirmed change.
